passwordReset.subject: Reset Your Password - Pocket Trade Hub
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password.
passwordReset.footer: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
passwordReset.expiryNote: This link will expire in 1 hour.
